title: Kreative Kids Children’s Glow in the Dark Bottle Sand Art Make Your Own Craft Activity Kit
features: Our Sand & Bottle Art Set Glow In The Dark is the perfect rainy day project for kids.
Promoting creativity, hand-eye co-ordination and fine motor skills, and ideal to display your art work around the house.
Super easy to use: pour the coloured sand into the decorative bottles one layer at a time using the tools provided creating amazing shapes and designs.
Box contains: 3 bags of glow in the dark sand, 3 bags of coloured sand, 6 different sand art bottles, 2 cords for making necklaces, funnel, sand crafting tools and instruction sheet.
description: Product Description Glow in the Dark Sand Art Everything you need to make glowing sand art Create Your Own Glow Sand Art Bottles Make amazing glow in the dark sand art! Complete with a funnel for easy sand pouring, it's an ideal arty activity for all abilities. Crafty fun for adults and kids alike! Build up funky patterns one layer at a time. Tilt the bottle to make different levels in the sand, or push the sand using the crafting tool to make interesting shapes. The pink, green and yellow sand even glows! Make awesome sand art that looks as good in the dark as it does during the day! Everything you need to make decorative sand art is right here in this box. No need for extra equipment or tools. Kit Contains: 3 Decorative Sand Colours 3 Glow in the Dark Sand Colours 4 Standard Bottle Caps 2 Necklace Charm Bottle Caps 1 Funnel 1 Sand Art Craft Tool 2 Rainbow Cords Instruction Sheet 6 Vibrant Sand Colours Cool Colourful Patterns Make awesome designs with 6 different sand colours, 3 of them even glow! Layer up Pink, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple and Orange into stunning creations. Watch the Pink, Yellow, and Green glow in the dark! For the best results, layer the glow in the dark sand between other colours to get striking patterns, even with the lights off! Art That Glows! Get the best out of your GLOW When you've finished your masterpieces, give your sand an extra boost to get a brighter glow. Sit your filled bottles in direct sunlight or under a bright lamp for at least 45 minutes to give the sand an extra charge. ** This is especially important when the sand is first out of the box. Crafts You Can Wear One of a Kind Necklaces As well as 4 decorative display bottles, the kit includes 2 smaller, wearable bottles. Both come with special bottle caps that turn them into necklace charms. Simply thread one of the rainbow cords through the bottle cap and there you go! Keep them for yourself, or maybe gift one to a friend! Bringing Creativity to Life Brought to you by Kandy Toys, Kreative Kids is a range of art and craft activities, from pocket money crafts that are ideal for gift bags and stocking fillers, to great value jumbo art kits, sewing kits, and more. Let their imaginations run wild with Kreative Kids!
